title: astragalus pycnostachyus var. lanosissimus
intro: Astragalus pycnostachyus var. lanosissimus, also known as Woolly Milkvetch, is a plant species in the legume family native to the western United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and immune-boosting effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as fatigue, stress, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Woolly Milkvetch include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Woolly Milkvetch is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, with the dried root being used for herbal preparations.
